items.title: Claude Corps
items.summary: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

items.title: WorkBench Revisited: Workplace Agents Two Years On
items.summary:

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

items.title: Making Claude a Chemist
items.summary: We’re working with world-class synthetic, computational, and analytical chemists to make Claude better at chemistry. In this post, we share our first work as part of this effort.
